_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: male Nf1± microglia had a ramification index (4.8 ± 0.1; n = 106 cells/4 mice) that was smaller than that observed for male WT microglia (6.2 ± 0.2; n = 53 cells/2 mice; p < 0.0001)
details: Male Nf1± microglia had reduced ramification index (4.8 ± 0.1) compared to male WT microglia (6.2 ± 0.2; p < 0.0001)
